summary: Frontend-only testing for Mentor TPA demo site. Tested all 15 routes, navbar + dropdown + CTAs, hospital panel filters (search, city, cashless, clear), all 3 forms (RequestProposal, BookDemo, Contact) validation & success flows, mobile navbar and mobile card layout. Zero console errors observed.
critical_code_review_comments: HospitalPanel.jsx (~166 lines) uses very long single-line JSX for filter selects/rows — readable but could be split into sub-components for maintainability.
RequestProposal / BookDemo share ~80% of form markup (Field component, org type select, validation regex) — consider extracting into a shared LeadForm component to honor DRY.
Contact.jsx phone placeholder '+92 00 000 0000' is a placeholder stub — fine for demo, but flag before production.
Forms use setTimeout to simulate submission (MOCKED — no backend call). Confirmed acceptable per review request; clearly frontend-only.
seed_data_creation: None — hospitals data is static seed (50 entries) in /app/frontend/src/data/hospitals.js.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 routes return 200 and render without console errors. Hospital filter counts: Aga Khan search=1/50, Karachi=12/50, Karachi+Cashless=9/50, clear=50/50. All 3 forms show required-field errors on empty submit, invalid-email error, and success screens (rp-success, bd-success, ct-success) on valid submit. BookDemo date picker (Popover+Calendar shadcn) works. Mobile (390px) renders card layout for hospitals and mobile-nav-panel toggle works. No backend exists — all submissions are MOCKED via 600-700ms setTimeout.
